subtitles.original: なにか意味深？
subtitles.english: Is there a deep meaning?

subtitles.original: Deep meaning! That's cool.
subtitles.english: Deep meaning! That's cool.

subtitles.original: かっこいいね！
subtitles.english: That's so cool!

subtitles.original: Cute and cool, Raora!
subtitles.english: Cute and cool, Raora!

subtitles.original: Raora can do it!
subtitles.english: Raora can do it!

subtitles.original: You are cool.
subtitles.english: You are cool.

subtitles.original: Everyone, everyone here is cool. / みんなクール！
subtitles.english: Everyone, everyone here is cool. / Everyone's cool!

subtitles.original: Pink is very cool.
subtitles.english: Pink is very cool.

subtitles.original: Pink's a cool color, okay? Hey.
subtitles.english: Pink's a cool color, okay? Hey.

subtitles.original: Well, happy birthday to you.
subtitles.english: Well, happy birthday to you.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much, Mori!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, Mori!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: おめでとう！ Happy birthday!
subtitles.english: Congratulations! Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you guys! Thank you for singing Brave Shine with me.
subtitles.english: Thank you guys! Thank you for singing Brave Shine with me.

subtitles.original: It's a very meaningful song, and...
subtitles.english: It's a very meaningful song, and...

subtitles.original: I really appreciate to have my dai-senpais with me! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: I really appreciate to have my dai-senpais with me! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Yeah, of course! Old senpai, old senpai is here with you.
subtitles.english: Yeah, of course! Old senpai, old senpai is here with you.

subtitles.original: Well, myself and Towa got to get out of here, but Raora, you keep on keeping on, okay?
subtitles.english: Well, myself and Towa got to get out of here, but Raora, you keep on keeping on, okay?

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll do my best then!
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll do my best then!

subtitles.original: Yeah, and we'll see you guys later, okay?
subtitles.english: Yeah, and we'll see you guys later, okay?

subtitles.original: See you guys later!
subtitles.english: See you guys later!

subtitles.original: Bye everybody! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Bye everybody! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 白い世界の中では
subtitles.english: In a white-colored world

subtitles.original: 時間は止まってゆくような気がした
subtitles.english: it seemed as if time had stopped

subtitles.original: いつも見せないような
subtitles.english: An expression you don't usually show,

subtitles.original: 表情が その距離が少しだけ愛しかった
subtitles.english: and that distance was just a little endearing

subtitles.original: 巻き戻せないと
subtitles.english: Realizing it can't be rewound,

subtitles.original: はしゃいでいるその横顔
subtitles.english: I look at your side profile in high spirits

subtitles.original: 抱えていた悩みも
subtitles.english: Even the worries I held...

subtitles.original: ちっぽけだ
subtitles.english: ...seem so small

subtitles.original: 君に染まる視界が
subtitles.english: My field of vision dyed by you,

subtitles.original: かじかんでく両手が
subtitles.english: and my freezing hands...

subtitles.original: 心から願うよ 終わらせたくなどはないんだと
subtitles.english: ...pray from my heart, wishing this would never end

subtitles.original: 思い出の中にはいつも君の姿
subtitles.english: Your figure is always in my memories

subtitles.original: 夢のまま 覚めないまま
subtitles.english: Like a dream, without waking up,

subtitles.original: その笑顔が忘れられないや
subtitles.english: I can't forget that smile

subtitles.original: 言葉では足りないようだ
subtitles.english: Words don't seem to be enough

subtitles.original: 大人になんてなれないよ
subtitles.english: I can't even become an adult

subtitles.original: くだらない事ばっか
subtitles.english: Full of meaningless things,

subtitles.original: それでも楽しかった
subtitles.english: yet it was fun nonetheless

subtitles.original: ずっと今がこのまま続いたらいいね
subtitles.english: It'd be nice if this moment could go on forever

subtitles.original: なんてさ僕に はにかんでみせるの
subtitles.english: You shyly said to me,

subtitles.original: 泣きそうな声で
subtitles.english: with a tearful voice

subtitles.original: 新しい世界では
subtitles.english: In this new world,

subtitles.original: きっと心から笑えているかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if you're laughing from your heart

subtitles.original: 謝りたいな
subtitles.english: I want to apologize,

subtitles.original: 見せる顔なんてないよ
subtitles.english: but I can't even show my face to you

subtitles.original: 僕は君の思う未来のどこにもいないようだ
subtitles.english: It seems I'm nowhere in the future you envision

subtitles.original: 逃げ出したくないよ
subtitles.english: I don't want to run away,

subtitles.original: あの日に戻りたくなるよ
subtitles.english: yet I want to go back to that day

subtitles.original: 振り向いてばかりの人生ならば 諦めよう
subtitles.english: If life is only about looking back, let's give up

subtitles.original: いたいけな祈りも
subtitles.english: Even this innocent prayer,

subtitles.original: 確かめたい気持ちも
subtitles.english: and these feelings I want to confirm...

subtitles.original: 今なら言えるだろうか
subtitles.english: ...can I say them now?

subtitles.original: 終わらせたくはないんだと知る
subtitles.english: I know that I don't want it to end

subtitles.original: 何度も言うよ 景色は儚げに
subtitles.english: I'll say it again and again, the scenery is ephemeral

subtitles.original: 足元はおぼつかない
subtitles.english: My footsteps are unsteady,

subtitles.original: 気付けば走り出していたんだ
subtitles.english: before I knew it, I was running

subtitles.original: 何度も言うよ
subtitles.english: I'll say it again and again,

subtitles.original: 会いたい言葉など 見つかるわけでもない
subtitles.english: though I can't find words like 'I want to meet you'

subtitles.original: それでもただ信じてみたいから
subtitles.english: Still, I just want to try and believe

subtitles.original: 思い出の中君の姿
subtitles.english: Your figure in my memories

subtitles.original: 夢のまま 覚めないまま
subtitles.english: Like a dream, without waking up,

subtitles.original: 変わらないな
subtitles.english: remains unchanged

subtitles.original: 思い出の中にはいつも君の姿
subtitles.english: Your figure is always in my memories

subtitles.original: 夢のまま 覚めないまま
subtitles.english: Like a dream, without waking up,

subtitles.original: その笑顔が忘れられないや
subtitles.english: I can't forget that smile

subtitles.original: 言葉では足りないようだ
subtitles.english: Words don't seem to be enough

subtitles.original: 大人になんてなれないよ
subtitles.english: I can't even become an adult

subtitles.original: くだらない事ばっか それでも楽しかった
subtitles.english: Full of meaningless things, yet it was fun nonetheless

subtitles.original: ずっと今がこのまま続いたらいいね
subtitles.english: It'd be nice if this moment could go on forever

responses.thoughts:
**My Processing of the Subtitle Task**

Alright, let's break this down. My primary objective is clear: to generate precise, synchronized subtitles in both Japanese (`og`) and English (`en`) for this video segment, and to do so *specifically* according to the instructions given. I'm focusing on the visual/audible cues for synchronization. The absence of pre-existing hardcoded subtitles for the initial talking portion (00:00 - 01:20 approx) signals that I'm starting from scratch there. The song, "Yakusoku" by Eve, performed by Raora and Ina, kicks in around 01:21, requiring transcription/translation as well.

I've got a firm grasp on the structure: a conversation first, then a song. I'm leveraging my native understanding (English and the relevant Japanese) to parse the spoken dialogue and translate it accurately and in context. The song lyrics will be tackled using the provided reference JSON, ensuring an accurate timecode mapping.

For the initial dialogue (00:00 - 00:54), I am meticulously identifying the speakers (Towa, Raora, Calli) to assign the lines correctly. Then, the talking portion is followed with an instrumental scene. I'm focusing on refining timecodes for the conversation, making sure the subtitles align perfectly with each vocal cue. The goal is precise matching, so the timing is going to be my focal point.

Moving onto the song, I’ll be using the provided reference JSON and checking the timing of the song and lyrics. I'm paying close attention to the visual cue of the title card "Yakusoku" (Promise), but my primary goal is with the song lyrics. This approach prioritizes accurate mapping. Then, I am carefully refining the timecodes for the song segment using the information in the provided JSON to make sure I am working with the most precise synchronization. The end of the video is straightforward (song ends, background music).

I must make sure to follow the formatting constraints: 50 characters per line, MM:SS.mmm format for timecodes, and no closed captioning tags. The result will be a finely tuned JSON output that reflects the subtitles accurately. Let's see if the tool works as planned.
